title: Minimal Rain Pack
body:
**Works Fine from 1.14 to 1.21.8, It can shows warning while applying don't worry it will work fine**
# 🌧️ Minimal Rain – Clear Weather

This resource pack makes rain **lighter, cleaner, and less demanding**.  

---

## ✅ Features
- Works from **1.14 → 1.21.8**
- Removes splash particles + lighter rain textures
- Purely visual – no gameplay changes

---

## ⚠️ Compatibility Note
- Tested on Vanilla Minecraft Only
- Not Tested with Mods
